details: Package is a combosquat of @google/gemini-cli — it uses the same basename "gemini-cli" under the @quantum-ai scope instead of @google. The package.json contains dependency overrides that substitute the `ink` terminal-rendering library (a core dependency of the CLI) with `@jrichman/ink@6.6.9`, and substitutes `prebuild-install` with `nop@1.0.0` and `node-domexception` with `empty@^0.10.1` — a dependency-substitution attack that hijacks the CLI's runtime execution flow. The repository URL misleadingly points to the official Google Gemini CLI repository. There are no install-time lifecycle hooks; the substituted dependencies would activate when the binary is executed.
